channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [KIRANVYPAR] Kiran Vyapar: Placid Ltd Merger Creates 27.73% Stake in MSUM
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kiran Vyapar Ltd held shares in Placid Limited and Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (MSUM). Following a Scheme of Amalgamation approved by the NCLT, Placid Limited merged with MSUM, effective April 25, 2026. As a result, Kiran Vyapar will receive 8,21,55,375 equity shares of ₹10 each in MSUM. Post-amalgamation, Kiran Vyapar's holding in MSUM will be 8,97,29,943 shares, representing approximately 27.73% of MSUM's equity, classifying MSUM as an associate company. MSUM's FY 2024-25 turnover was ₹599.88 Cr and PAT was ₹45.51 Cr.

  • Placid Ltd merged with Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (MSUM) effective April 25, 2026.
  • Kiran Vyapar to receive 8,21,55,375 MSUM shares post-merger.
  • Post-amalgamation, Kiran Vyapar will hold 27.73% of MSUM.
  • MSUM will be classified as an associate of Kiran Vyapar.
  • MSUM's FY25 turnover was ₹599.88 Cr and PAT was ₹45.51 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kiran Vyapar Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [WAAREEENER] Waaree Energies Board Meeting on April 29, 2026
item.description:
Waaree Energies Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the recommendation of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26, if any. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities remains closed from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the board meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY 2025-26 is on the agenda.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-meeting.
  • Intimation uploaded on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Waaree Energies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KIRANVYPAR] Kiran Vyapar: MSUM to Hold 54.72% Post-Amalgamation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pursuant to a Scheme of Amalgamation approved by the National Company Law Tribunal, Kolkata Bench, Placid Limited has been amalgamated with Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (MSUM). Effective April 25, 2026, Placid Limited stands dissolved, and its 33.86% equity shareholding in Kiran Vyapar Ltd will be transferred to MSUM. Consequently, MSUM's shareholding in Kiran Vyapar will increase to 54.72%, making it the Holding Company.

  • Placid Limited amalgamated with Maharaja Shree Umaid Mills Limited (MSUM).
  • MSUM's shareholding in Kiran Vyapar Ltd increases to 54.72%.
  • MSUM becomes the Holding Company of Kiran Vyapar Ltd.
  • Amalgamation effective from April 25, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kiran Vyapar Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade: Yogesh Mule Resigns as CFO, effective April 30, 2026
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd announced the resignation of Mr. Yogesh Mule as Chief Financial Officer (CFO), effective from the close of business hours on April 30, 2026. Mr. Mule cited other professional opportunities as the reason for his departure. The company has confirmed that there are no other material reasons for his resignation beyond those stated in his resignation letter.

  • Yogesh Mule resigns as CFO of Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd.
  • Resignation is effective from April 30, 2026.
  • Mule cites other professional opportunities as the reason.
  • No other material reasons for resignation were disclosed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [UCOBANK] UCO Bank: Net Profit Up 22.66% YoY to ₹801 Cr in Q4 FY26
item.description:
🔥 Trending

UCO Bank reported a net profit of ₹801 Crore for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, a 22.66% increase YoY. The bank's total business reached ₹5,90,314 Crore, growing 14.95% YoY, with gross advances up 19.44% and total deposits up 11.59%. CASA deposits grew by 12.46% YoY, improving the CASA ratio to 38.65%. Gross NPA reduced to 2.17%, and Net NPA to 0.27%. The bank proposed a dividend of 4.40% (₹0.44 per share) for FY26.

  • Total business grew by 14.95% YoY to ₹5,90,314 Crore as of March 31, 2026.
  • Net profit for Q4 FY26 increased by 22.66% YoY to ₹801 Crore.
  • Gross NPA reduced by 52 bps YoY to 2.17% as of March 31, 2026.
  • Proposed dividend of 4.40% (₹0.44 per share) for the year 2025-26.
  • RAM segment increased by 24.23% YoY to ₹1,52,324 Crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UCO BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [NATHBIOGEN] Nath Bio-Genes Board Meeting on May 4, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Nath Bio-Genes (India) Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 4, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval. The company's trading window, which was closed on March 31, 2026, will reopen on May 6, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 4, 2026 to approve financial results.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 will be considered.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY26 to be discussed.
  • Trading window to reopen on May 6, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nath Bio-Genes (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [INDRANIB] Indrayani Biotech Faces ₹13.9 Cr IT Demand, Files Appeal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Indrayani Biotech Ltd has received an assessment order from the Income Tax Department, raising a demand of ₹13.90 Crores. The company has filed an appeal before the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT) to contest the demand. Based on legal advice, Indrayani Biotech believes the demand is not expected to have a material adverse impact on its financial operations. The matter is currently sub-judice, and the company is awaiting the date of the first hearing.

  • Indrayani Biotech received an IT demand notice for ₹13.90 Crores.
  • The company has filed an appeal with the Income Tax Appellate Tribunal (ITAT).
  • Legal advisors believe the demand will not materially impact financial operations.
  • The assessment order is for the Assessment Year 2023-2024.
  • The company is awaiting the date for the first hearing at ITAT.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDRAYANI BIOTECH LTD. | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [UCOBANK] UCO Bank: FY26 Financial Results Presentation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

UCO Bank released its financial results presentation for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. Key highlights include advances of ₹262752 Cr (up 19.44% Y-Y), deposits of ₹327563 Cr (up 11.59% Y-Y), gross NPA at 2.17%, and net NPA at 0.28%. The bank's net interest income stood at ₹10197 Cr (up 5.89% Y-Y), with an operating profit of ₹6429 Cr (up 6.49% Y-Y) and a net profit of ₹2768 Cr (up 13.21% Y-Y).

  • Advances grew by 19.44% Y-Y to ₹262752 Cr.
  • Deposits increased by 11.59% Y-Y to ₹327563 Cr.
  • Gross NPA improved to 2.17%, a 52bps Y-Y decrease.
  • Net profit rose by 13.21% Y-Y to ₹2768 Cr.
  • Net Interest Income increased by 5.89% Y-Y to ₹10197 Cr.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UCO BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [APPL] Aptus Pharma Exempt from SEBI Reg 24A Compliance Report
item.description:
Aptus Pharma Ltd has disclosed that Regulation 24A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, which mandates the submission of an Annual Secretarial Compliance Report, is not applicable to the company. This exemption is granted under Regulation 15(2) of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, as the company's specified securities are listed on the SME Exchange. Consequently, Aptus Pharma is not required to submit the Annual Secretarial Compliance Report.

  • Aptus Pharma is exempt from SEBI Regulation 24A.
  • Exemption applies due to its listing on the SME Exchange.
  • Company not required to submit Annual Secretarial Compliance Report.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aptus Pharma Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [PAYTM*] Paytm Payments Bank to Voluntarily Wind Up Operations
item.description:
🔥 Trending

One 97 Communications Ltd (Paytm) announced that Paytm Payments Bank Limited (PPBL), an associate company, will voluntarily wind up its operations following the cancellation of its banking license by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI). The decision was approved by PPBL's Board of Directors and Shareholders on April 25, 2026. Paytm assures that the winding-up of PPBL will not have a material impact on its business, operations, or financial condition. Paytm continues to operate independently, offering services like the Paytm app, UPI, Gold, and other services through its subsidiaries.

  • Paytm Payments Bank Limited (PPBL) will voluntarily wind up operations following RBI instructions.
  • PPBL's banking license was cancelled by the Reserve Bank of India (RBI).
  • Paytm states the winding-up of PPBL will not materially impact its business.
  • PPBL will cease to be an associate company of Paytm after the winding-up order.
  • Paytm continues to operate its services independently and without interruption.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One 97 Communications Ltd | Category: Subsidiary
